pi_items.source: Confirmed via analysis of scripts/task_utils.sh where MUNCIE_DIR is configured.
Confirmed via analysis of tasks/identify_critical_cross_section/setup_task.sh which creates the results directory.
Confirmed via analysis of tasks/identify_critical_cross_section/setup_task.sh which hardcodes this path for GT generation.

privileged_info_summary: The task is structurally broken and impossible to pass due to an environment mismatch. The setup script (setup_task.sh) relies on a ground truth generation script that attempts to access the 'Geometry/Cross Sections/Bank Stations' HDF5 dataset, which does not exist in the HEC-RAS 6.6 environment. This raises an error and calls exit(1). Combined with 'set -e' in setup_task.sh, the task initialization crashes entirely and /var/lib/hec-ras/ground_truth.json is never created. Consequently, verifier.py will always fail with 'System Error: Ground truth not found'. If the setup script were corrected, the simulation would reveal 61 cross-sections, all of which overtop, with the critical section being River Station 1174.213 (minimum freeboard: -14.4631 ft).
